findings.body: src/state/focused-session-context.ts should run the STAGE_EVIDENCE_INFOS pathExists checks in parallel for entries with stageNum <= current stage, then preserve the current dependency order when adding missing dependency trust signals.

.bandit/policy/evidence-freshness-slos.json uses source_identity current_review_subject_hash for review_subject_hash freshness budget entries; CodeRabbit recommends changing matching source_identity values to current or removing the redundant field if kind is sufficient.
